idea-plugin.name: Code Notes
idea-plugin.description:
Attach persistent, structured knowledge notes directly to your source code — files, classes, methods, or any selected code — without leaving the IDE.

  • Right-click any code and "Add Code Note..." (comment, bug, question, architecture, TODO, etc.)
  • Notes survive minor edits via line + content-hash anchoring
  • Gutter icons with hover previews on annotated lines
  • Searchable Code Notes tool window with jump-to-code navigation
  • Bilingual UI: English / 简体中文, follows the IDE locale automatically
  • Notes are stored per-project in .idea/codeNotes.xml — plain text, git-friendly

This is an actively evolving MVP. Planned next: Markdown/Mermaid rich editor, Kanban TODO board, knowledge graph view, and AI-assisted note generation.
